# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the pending amendments in the existing Bash CLI: review findings are no longer encoded as exit code 2, so a reviewer process that exits 2 is treated as an operational failure; git-state fingerprinting now reads tracked/untracked paths with NUL-delimited `git ls-files -z` and hashes file contents safely for paths containing tabs or other quoted characters. Added deterministic smoke coverage for both regressions: reviewer exit 2 fails immediately without burning review rounds, and an untracked path containing a tab affects implementer stability detection.","outstanding_risks":["`make test` could not be invoked because `make` is not installed in this environment; the same commands from the Makefile were run directly instead.","`nix build` was not run because this repository has no `flake.nix`."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected `bin/rb-lite`, current tests, and the active git diff to confirm the pending amendments and avoid touching unrelated `.ralph-burni
